infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Memory 5 needs your location to alert you when you are near a pinned place.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Memory 5 needs background location to send proximity alerts even when the app is closed.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Memory 5 uses your location to show pins on the map and trigger nearby reminders.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Memory 5 needs your location to alert you when near a pinned place.
